posts.author: eldar_mozes (Eldar mozes)
posts.cookedHtml:
1000 items is really a little and the filtering options are very limited.

  1. Let us choose which groups we want to include from each board.
  2. Give us an option to an seen an item without a do date.
    when an item dosnt have a do date i don’t need him in my my work.
